_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in performing packet-level analysis using appropriate tools (e.g., Wireshark, tcpdump).
reference_document_element_description: Skill in debugging data applications across multiple system layers, tracing issues through application code, database queries, network connectivity, and infrastructure configuration to identify root causes.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-S-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-011 (TF, cosine: 0.452), TF-S-005 (TF, cosine: 0.444).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.1/10 (raw 0.411). Shared vocabulary: [skill]. DCWF-only terms [analysis, appropriate, level, packet, performing, tcpdump] vs WIDAI-only terms [across, application, applications, causes, code, configuration] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.855 (P=0.855, R=0.854). Balanced P/R — the 11-word DCWF element and 25-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Skill in performing packet-level analysis using appropriate tools (e.g., Wiresha" and "Skill in debugging data applications across multiple system layers, tracing issu" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.493 > STS 0.411 (gap +0.082). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.6%. Shared tokens: [skill]. DCWF-only: [analysis, appropriate, level, packet, performing, tcpdump]. WIDAI-only: [across, application, applications, causes, code, configuration].
